title: Blink Charging Stock Forecast Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Blink Charging BLNK Stock Forecast and Analyst Ratings. Analyst Ratings. According to 3 analysts, Blink Charging BLNK has a Buy consensus rating as of May 15, 2026. Out of 14 Wall Street analysts, 3 rate it as Buy, 3 as Hold, and 0 as Sell, with a median price target of $2.00. Price Targets for 2026. The price target forecasts vary considerably: The Blink Charging BLNK price prediction in 2026 is $2.33. The 6 analysts that cover Blink Charging Co. stock have an average price target of $2.13, forecasting a 211.22% increase in the stock price over the next year. The highest price target for BLNK is $5.00 from HC Wainwright and Co., representing a 612.3% increase from current price. The lowest price target for BLNK is $1.00 from Barclays, representing a 42.5% increase. Financial Forecast. On average, analysts forecast that BLNK EPS will be -$0.43 for 2026, with the lowest EPS forecast at -$0.61 and the highest at -$0.32. Analyst forecasts are subject to substantial market risks and past performance does not guarantee future results.
